title: A Silly Adventure with Uncle
article_text: Firstly, my uncle gave me a hint about a controversial logic problem. It was a raw and silly idea, but it hooked my interest like a bell. I began to panic when I saw a printer on a steep slope near a vessel of liquid. The grammar of the problem was hard, so I had to revise it. My genuine happiness came when I found the correct verb and noun. Rice was in the vessel, and transportation was needed to move it. The bell rang, and I felt no more anxiety. It was an adventure that taught me about happiness and logic. My uncle reckoned that the problem was not as hard as it seemed. The fence on the slope was a good reminder to stay safe.

sentences.en: Firstly, my uncle gave me a hint about a controversial logic problem.
sentences.zh: 首先，我叔叔给了我一个关于一个有争议的逻辑问题的提示。

sentences.en: My genuine happiness came when I found the correct verb and noun.
sentences.zh: 当我找到正确的动词和名词时，我真正的快乐来了。
